title: COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER - 211info
text: YMCA OF MID-WILLAMETTE COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a variety of recreation opportunities; aquatic center, preschool, gym and group exercise classes; youth and adult sports. Provides CPR, First Aid, baby sitter, and Lifeguard training classes. 3201 Pacific Boulevard SW Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours Email (541) 926-4488 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 926-4488 Main phone Main phone (541) 926-4488 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service -Preschool visit website for current monthly prices -Youth and adult sports are available for an extra cost, but members receive a discount. Title 10 military employees are eligible for a discounted membership as well as individuals with United Health Care health insurance. Financial assistance is available to the public for up to 50% of membership costs by application. DOCUMENTS: Proof of military status if applying for military discount AREA SERVED: Benton, Linn, and Marion Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 5am-9pm, Friday 5:30am-7pm, Saturday-Sunday 7am-1pm Services: Aquarobics/Aquatic Exercise Babysitting Instruction Exercise Classes/Groups First Aid Instruction General Recreational Activities/Sports Preschools Swimming Facilities Swimming/Swimming Lessons Team Sports/Leagues Water Safety Education Y Facilities Other Services Offered At This Location: LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - CLUB Y LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - NON-SCHOOL DAY PROGRAM SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - CAMPS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. YMCA OF MID-WILLAMETTE
